drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0($b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f0)

end
rule "R1"
salience -1
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), 9, true));
    insertLogical(new T1($b1_0_0, -1000000007, true));

when
    T1(f0 in ("zz"), f0 contains "", $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f1)

    T0(f0 not in ("b"))

end
rule "R4"

when
    $p4_0 : T0(f0 contains "alpha", f0 in ("zz", "") || f0 == "a", $b4_0_0 : f0)
then

rule "R5"
